features.rothText: Contributions - Until , participants were permitted to contribute up to 100% of their pre-tax annual compensation, as defined by the Plan, and/or make Roth 401(k) deferrals to the Plan, without exceeding limitations prescribed by the Internal Revenue Code (the “Code”).
features.eligibilityText: Employees who were at least twenty-one years of age were eligible to participate in the Plan on the first day of the month following the completion of one month of service.
features.autoEnrollText: The Plan also included an auto-enrollment provision whereby all newly eligible employees were automatically enrolled in the Plan at a deferral rate of 6% of their eligible compensation unless they affirmatively elected not to participate in the Plan, or made an alternate election at any time.
